caption: A man with blond hair, wearing a dark navy t-shirt, is seen in a small inset window in the bottom left of each frame, reacting with surprise and excitement. He is positioned in front of a computer monitor and a decorated Christmas tree. The main screen displays a colorful, stylized game environment with the text "HARVEST PRESENT" in the upper left. The background features a yellow, sunburst pattern with autumn themes, including orange pumpkins and green vines. A large, red, stylized symbol resembling a "U" or a "J" dominates the center, set against a backdrop of tiered seating or stadium bleachers. Small icons and labels such as "UKITINMARK," "PRIMES ALL," and "BACK" are visible near the bottom of the game screen. Across the frames, the man’s facial expressions shift from wide-mouthed shock to a more focused, excited expression as he gestures with his hands.
